local_match_rules: incident mentions Lodi or nearby Central Valley / San Joaquin geography
incident source marks affected area as California, Northern California, Central Valley, Sacramento region, Stockton area, or nearby service footprint
incident is infrastructure-related and plausibly impacts local managed clients
global_match_rules: vendor status or multiple credible sources indicate global, multi-region, widespread, or broad North America impact
major shared platform outage likely to create downstream client tickets even outside immediate geography
core identity, mail, cloud, DNS, CDN, telecom, or business-critical SaaS degradation

realert_only_when: scope changes from local to global or global into local relevance

p1: local power or internet outage affecting service footprint
widespread Microsoft 365, Google Workspace, Azure, AWS, Cloudflare, or identity outage
major PSA/RMM/backup/security outage with immediate client operations impact
p2: significant degradation in major SaaS used by property management or CPA clients
regional carrier or ISP issue with credible business impact
partial outage with broad admin or user workflow disruption
p3: advisories, partial degradation, monitoring state, or narrow-scope vendor issue worth awareness but not urgent escalation
